response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payments that I did not make. The block has disrupted my access to Google services and is affecting my ability to perform daily tasks.  

I am unable to provide specific details about the payments, as they were not mine. I have reviewed the transaction records and confirmed that no legitimate payments were made. I am committed to complying with Google’s policies and would appreciate the opportunity to resolve this issue.  

Please consider unblocking my account and restoring access to my services. I am available for a chat to discuss further.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
